# Developer

Agents for engineering review, debugging intake, and integration planning.

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_catalog.py -->

## Agents

- [API Integration Builder](./api-integration-builder/): Plans API integrations and endpoint flows.
  Best for: engineering workflows, bug and code review. Tags: `developer`, `engineering`, `api`, `integration`.
- [Bug Triage Agent](./bug-triage-agent/): Turns bug reports into reproducible engineering work.
  Best for: engineering workflows, bug and code review. Tags: `developer`, `engineering`, `bug`, `triage`.
- [Code Reviewer](./code-reviewer/): Reviews code changes for bugs, risks, and test gaps.
  Best for: engineering workflows, bug and code review. Tags: `developer`, `engineering`, `code`.
